headerDisplay: Bridges Miele@home appliances into HomeKit via the Miele 3rd-party cloud API (REST + Server-Sent Events). Pair the plugin at https://www.miele.com/developer/ to obtain a client ID/secret + initial access/refresh token pair.
footerDisplay: Token state is persisted under Homebridge's data directory. Once you've set the access/refresh token pair below they are migrated to the persistent store on first launch; subsequent refreshes happen automatically and you can leave the config fields blank after the first successful run.

accessToken.title: Initial Access Token
accessToken.description: One-time seed; ignored once a persisted token is on disk.

refreshToken.title: Initial Refresh Token
refreshToken.description: One-time seed; ignored once a persisted token is on disk.

language.title: API Language
language.description: Optional. Two-letter language code (e.g. 'de', 'en') for localised Miele enum strings.

reconnectEventStreamMinutes.title: Periodic SSE Reconnect (minutes)
reconnectEventStreamMinutes.description: How often to cycle the SSE event stream proactively. Defends against load-balancer idle drops; 60 minutes is fine for most setups.
